parameters.subject: demo
parameters.message:
=Hi {{ $json.Client_Name }},

This is a gentle reminder that an outstanding payment of ₹{{ $json.Outstanding_Amount }} is pending.

We request you to kindly complete the payment on or before {{ $json.Due_Date }} to avoid any inconvenience.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best regards,
{{ $('Webhook1').item.json.body.name }}

parameters.text:
={{ $json.body.prompt }}
above is the prompt from the user so write a short formal mail in the respect of what the user is asking for.
give the response in proper json format.
dont give subject , give me only body of the mail.

json.Remarks: Customer acknowledges outstanding payment and will pay on Tuesday.

body.prompt: Give me a email for announcing 10% discount at all jeans collection Gadge Garments

output.response:
Dear Valued Customer,

We are excited to announce a special offer at Gadge Garments! Enjoy a 10% discount on our entire jeans collection, available for a limited time.

Discover our wide range of styles, fits, and washes, crafted with quality and comfort in mind. Whether you're looking for classic denim, trendy designs, or everyday essentials, now is the perfect time to update your wardrobe.

Visit us in-store or shop online to take advantage of this exclusive discount.

Sincerely,
The Gadge Garments Team

body.prompt: Generate a visual financial report for January 2026 from the invoice sheet.Create charts for: (1) total income received vs outstanding amount, (2) invoice count by payment status (paid, pending, partial), and (3) overdue vs upcoming dues. Also include key totals, percentages, and a short summary.

output.report:
Financial Report - January 2026

Summary for January 2026

This report provides a financial overview for January 2026. During this month, a total of 8 invoices were issued, amounting to $8000. Of these, $2200 has been successfully collected, leaving $5800 outstanding specifically from January's invoices. Overall, considering all invoices in the system as of January 31, 2026, $3700 has been received, with a total of $5800 still outstanding across all invoices. The payment status breakdown for January 2026 invoices shows that 25% are Paid, 50% are Pending, and 25% are Partial. As of January 31, 2026, a significant sum of $4700 in dues is overdue, while $1100 are upcoming.

Key Metrics (January 2026)

Total Invoices Issued (Jan 2026): 8
Total Amount Invoiced (Jan 2026): $8000
Amount Received (from Jan 2026 Invoices): $2200
Outstanding (from Jan 2026 Invoices): $5800
Overall Income Received (All Invoices to Jan 31, 2026): $3700
Overall Outstanding Amount (All Invoices to Jan 31, 2026): $5800
Overdue Dues (as of Jan 31, 2026): $4700
Upcoming Dues (as of Jan 31, 2026): $1100

Total Income Received vs Outstanding Amount (Overall)

Invoice Count by Payment Status (Jan 2026 Invoices)

Overdue vs Upcoming Dues (as of Jan 31, 2026)

Report Generated on: January 31, 2026
